command: python -m pip install -r requirements-colab.txt && python -m scripts.branchynet_mobilenet_cifar100 --output-name branchynet_mobilenet_cifar100_001 --exit-indices 5,12 --epochs 5 --batch-size 128 --val-size 5000 --learning-rate 1e-4 --weight-decay 1e-4 --threshold-candidates 9 --max-threshold-combinations 2000 --require-cuda
